name: Curried Squash Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté onions and garlic in sherry for about 2 minutes.
2. Add curry powder, cumin, salt, and pepper; cook another 3-5 minutes or until onions are soft.
3. Add in cooked squash pieces and stir to coat.
4. Pour in chicken broth and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer 15-20 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and allow to cool about 15 minutes.
6. Puree the soup using a hand blender, food processor, or blender until smooth (will be thick).
7. Return to low heat and gently reheat.
